problem id: f85074ab
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) OR SHR(6)) AND ROT(3)

examples:
  00100100 -> 00000000
  11001011 -> 00010110
  01111001 -> 11000011
  10010000 -> 00000000
  00101110 -> 01010000
  00101100 -> 01000000
  01010000 -> 10000000

query: 01000111
predicted answer: 00001010
